esp32_ota_begin.tooltip: Start ArduinoOTA wireless update service (need to connect to WiFi first)

esp32_ota_handle.tooltip: Called in the loop to handle OTA update requests

esp32_ota_set_hostname.tooltip: Set the host name of the OTA device

esp32_ota_on_start.tooltip: Callback triggered when OTA update starts

esp32_ota_on_end.tooltip: Callback triggered when OTA update ends

esp32_ota_on_progress.message0: When OTA update progress changes Current %1 Total %2
esp32_ota_on_progress.tooltip: OTA update progress callback to obtain the current progress and total size

esp32_ota_on_error.message0: When an OTA update error occurs, the error code is %1
esp32_ota_on_error.tooltip: Callback triggered when OTA update error occurs
